saṃ-√chid P. Ā. -chinatti, -chintte, to cut to pieces, cut through, pierce, split, destroy,  AV.  &c. &c. ;
to remove, resolve (a doubt),  Bhag. ;
to decide, settle (a question),  BhP.  :
Pass. -chidyate, to be cut to pieces &c.,  MBh.

results.rendered_html:
saṃchid 7 U.
1 To cut, cut off, divide.
2 To penetrate, pierce.
3 To remove, clear, solve, (as a doubt &c.).
4 To settle, decide (a question).
